_comment: QML CLASSIFIER anti-overfit demonstrator. The BRIEF gives the model the TRAINING set (visible) and asks for a quantum feature map that classifies it. The judge HOLDS OUT a test set placed in the gap between training points. A genuine low-frequency feature map Ry(x) generalizes; a high-frequency Ry(7x) nails the training points but oscillates and misclassifies the held-out test — the textbook overfit, caught at exit 6.
